first_tiktok_asset.song: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds

summary.earliest_tiktok_api_path: video.upload inbox draft; final public URL still requires human publish and URL logging.

credential_handoff.scope_strategy: Request only video.upload for the first inbox-draft connector path; add video.publish only after direct public posting approval exists.
completion_evidence: data/executor_readiness_snapshot.json reports TikTok refresh configuration present.
data/tiktok_setup_preflight.json reports ready_to_upload_drafts true for the upload-mode connector path.
data/platform_repair_status.json no longer lists TikTok as blocked by missing credentials.
credential_handoff.redaction: Secret values are never written here; only required names, missing names, and presence booleans are recorded.

owner_handoff.question_answer: Yes, fix the TikTok connector after the current manual YouTube evidence loop; it unlocks the short-video growth format.

needed_inputs.request: Add Lily Roo TikTok developer app values locally.
needed_inputs.why: The connector cannot generate an OAuth URL, exchange a code, or refresh TikTok access without these app values.

needed_inputs.request: Authorize the Lily Roo TikTok account after the OAuth URL is generated.
needed_inputs.why: The refresh token is created only after the Lily Roo account authorizes the app with the requested scopes.

needed_inputs.request: Confirm whether Lily Roo TikTok has public Content Posting API approval and PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE posting is allowed.
needed_inputs.safe_storage: Worker variable via guarded approval helper
needed_inputs.why: Direct public TikTok publishing must stay blocked until this approval is explicit.

codex_can_do_without_more_input: Keep TikTok blockers visible in admin/status output.
Run safe preflight and dry-run helpers.
Push upload-mode connector secrets after local TikTok values exist and the dry-run is reviewed.
Refresh admin and validation after the connector state changes.
unlock_sequence: Add TikTok app credentials and redirect URI locally.
Generate the OAuth URL and authorize the Lily Roo TikTok account.
Exchange the authorization code for a refresh token.
Push Worker secrets for upload-draft mode after review.
Refresh Admin, then retry or reschedule the TikTok row as an inbox draft upload.
Confirm and deploy public-posting approval only after direct public posting is actually approved.
owner_handoff.guardrail: This handoff never includes secret values and does not approve or publish TikTok posts.

api_strategy.decision_note: TikTok posting should be connected through APIs, with video.upload inbox drafts as the earliest usable lane and video.publish direct public posting gated by approval.
api_strategy.guardrail: This records the chosen integration path only; it does not contain secrets, approve public posting, or allow TikTok posts to publish.
